name: BASIL-MD
description: BASIL-MD WhatsApp Bot — feature-rich, built with Node.js and Baileys

SESSION_ID.description: Your BASIL-MD pairing session ID — get it at https://basil-pair.onrender.com

OWNER_NUMBER.description: Your WhatsApp number with country code, no + (e.g. 2638412345678)

LOADER_URL.description: URL to the loader script (required — set to the Gist raw URL provided in setup docs)

BUNDLE_TOKEN.description: GitHub PAT (fine-grained, read-only on BASIL-MD-RELEASES repo) for private asset downloads

BUNDLE_KEY.description: 64-char hex AES-256-CBC key for bundle decryption

LOADER_SHA256.description: SHA-256 hash of loader.js for integrity verification (recommended)

MODE.description: Bot mode: public / groups / private / inbox

TIME_ZONE.description: Optional — bot auto-detects your server timezone. Set this to override (e.g. Africa/Harare, Africa/Lagos, America/New_York)

WELCOME.description: Send welcome message when members join groups (true/false)

DATABASE_URL.description: PostgreSQL URI from Neon.tech or Supabase (optional — SQLite used if blank, but data resets on dyno restart)
